_meta.purpose: Golden master for LocationDnaRankingEngine::rankCandidates(). Frozen INPUTS plus the outputs the engine produces TODAY. Any refactor that changes a byte fails.
_meta.generated_from: property_location_pois WHERE ranking_score IS NOT NULL
_meta.note_historical_divergence: 15 of 995 rows differ from the value persisted historically; all are top_rated_dining. See erratum E-48: ranking_score is set-relative (distance is normalised by max distance across the candidate set), so a truncated top-3 persistence cannot reproduce scores computed over the full fetched set. The golden master asserts engine determinism, not historical reproduction.
